---
title: "Lecture 8: Introduction to CSS"
subtitle: "{{< meta course.number >}} - {{< meta course.title >}}"
author: "{{< meta instructor.name >}}"
date: "February 5, 2026"
code-annotations: below
format: 
  revealjs:
    slide-number: true
    code-link: true
    highlight-style: a11y
    chalkboard: true
    transition: slide
    transition-speed: default
    code-line-numbers: true
    code-overflow: wrap
    theme: 
      - ../course-slides-styles.scss
---

## {#title-slide data-menu-title="Title Slide" background="#053660"}

<div class="custom-title">
[Lecture 8]{.baby-blue-text}
</div>

<div class="custom-subtitle">
[Introduction to CSS]{.white-text}
</div>

<div class="custom-subtitle3">
Week 2 | Unit I: HTML Forms & CSS Introduction<br>
{{< meta course.number >}} - {{< meta course.title >}}<br>
{{< meta instructor.name >}}, {{< meta instructor.title >}}
</div>

---

## {data-menu-title="Learning Objectives"}

[Learning Objectives]{.slide-title}

<hr>

::: {.incremental .body-text-m}
- Understand what CSS is and why it matters
- Apply CSS using three methods
- Write CSS selectors and rules
- Use basic CSS properties for styling
- Link external stylesheets
:::

::: {.notes}
CSS transforms plain HTML into beautifully designed web pages. It's the visual language of the web.
:::

---

## {data-menu-title="What is CSS?"}

[CSS: Cascading Style Sheets]{.slide-title}

<hr>

::: {.body-text-m}
::: {.fragment}
[**CSS**]{.teal-text} separates content from presentation
:::
::: {.fragment}
- HTML provides **structure**
:::
::: {.fragment}
- CSS provides **styling**
:::
::: {.fragment}
- JavaScript provides **behavior**
:::
:::

::: {.fragment}
```
HTML = Skeleton (structure)
CSS  = Clothes & appearance
JS   = Movement & interaction
```
:::

---

## {data-menu-title="Three CSS Methods"}

[Three Ways to Apply CSS]{.slide-title}

<hr>

::: columns
::: {.column width="33%"}
[**1. Inline CSS**]{.teal-text}

```html
<p style="color: red;">
  Red text
</p>
```

Least preferred
:::

::: {.column width="33%"}
[**2. Internal CSS**]{.teal-text}

```html
<style>
  p { color: blue; }
</style>
```

In `<head>` tag
:::

::: {.column width="33%"}
[**3. External CSS**]{.teal-text}

```html
<link rel="stylesheet" 
      href="style.css">
```

Best practice!
:::
:::

---

## {data-menu-title="CSS Syntax"}

[CSS Rule Syntax]{.slide-title}

<hr>

```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ selector { property: value; }       в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ

        вҶ“          вҶ“          вҶ“
     What    Which        To what
    to style  property    value
```

**Example:**

```css
p {
    color: red;
    font-size: 16px;
    background-color: yellow;
}
```

---

## {data-menu-title="CSS Selectors"}

[Common CSS Selectors]{.slide-title}

<hr>

::: {.body-text-m}
::: {.fragment}
[**Element Selector**]{.teal-text} - Select all `<p>` tags
```css
p { color: blue; }
```
:::
::: {.fragment}
[**Class Selector**]{.teal-text} - Select by class attribute (`.` prefix)
```css
.highlight { background: yellow; }
```
:::
::: {.fragment}
[**ID Selector**]{.teal-text} - Select by id attribute (`#` prefix)
```css
#header { font-size: 24px; }
```
:::
:::

---

## {data-menu-title="Using Classes & IDs"}

[Classes vs IDs]{.slide-title}

<hr>

```{.html code-line-numbers="|1-5|6-10"}
<!-- Classes (reusable) -->
<p class="highlight">Important text</p>
<p class="highlight">More important text</p>
<span class="highlight">Also important</span>

<!-- IDs (unique) -->
<div id="header">Page Header</div>
<h1>Title</h1>
<!-- There should only be ONE element with id="header" -->
```

**In CSS:**
```css
.highlight { color: red; }    /* Affects all class="highlight" */
#header { background: blue; } /* Affects id="header" only */
```

---

## {data-menu-title="Color Properties"}

[CSS Color Properties]{.slide-title}

<hr>

```{.css code-line-numbers="|1|2|3|4"}
color: red;                    /* Text color */
background-color: #f0f0f0;     /* Background color */
border: 2px solid blue;        /* Border color */
opacity: 0.8;                  /* Transparency (0-1) */
```

**Color formats:**

```css
color: red;              /* Named color */
color: #FF0000;          /* Hexadecimal */
color: rgb(255, 0, 0);   /* RGB values */
color: rgba(255, 0, 0, 0.5); /* RGB with alpha */
```

---

## {data-menu-title="Font Properties"}

[CSS Font Styling]{.slide-title}

<hr>

```{.css code-line-numbers="|1|2|3|4|5|6"}
font-family: Arial, sans-serif;  /* Font type */
font-size: 16px;                 /* Size -->
font-weight: bold;               /* Bold, 100-900 -->
font-style: italic;              /* Italic -->
text-align: center;              /* Alignment -->
text-decoration: underline;      /* Underline, overline, etc -->
```

**Safe fonts:**
```css
font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif;
font-family: Georgia, serif;
font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
```

---

## {data-menu-title="Box Model"}

[The CSS Box Model]{.slide-title}

<hr>

Every element has padding, border, and margin:

```
в•”в•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•—
в•‘       MARGIN (Outside)         в•‘
в•‘  в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ  в•‘
в•‘  в”Ӯ BORDER                   в”Ӯ  в•‘
в•‘  в”Ӯ  в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ  в”Ӯ  в•‘
в•‘  в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ PADDING (Inside)   в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ  в•‘
в•‘  в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ  в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ  в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ  в•‘
в•‘  в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ   CONTENT    в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ  в•‘
в•‘  в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ  в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ  в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ  в•‘
в•‘  в”Ӯ  в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ  в”Ӯ  в•‘
в•‘  в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ  в•‘
в•ҡв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•қ
```

---

## {data-menu-title="Spacing Properties"}

[Margin & Padding]{.slide-title}

<hr>

```{.css code-line-numbers="|1|2|3|4|5"}
margin: 10px;              /* Space outside (all sides) -->
padding: 20px;             /* Space inside (all sides) -->
margin: 10px 20px;         /* Top/bottom, left/right -->
padding: 10px 20px 30px 40px; /* Top, right, bottom, left -->
border: 2px solid red;     /* Width, style, color -->
```

**Individual sides:**
```css
margin-top: 10px;
margin-right: 20px;
margin-bottom: 10px;
margin-left: 20px;
```

---

## {data-menu-title="Width & Height"}

[Dimensions in CSS]{.slide-title}

<hr>

```{.css code-line-numbers="|1|2|3|4|5"}
width: 300px;           /* Fixed width in pixels -->
width: 100%;            /* Percentage of parent -->
width: 100vw;           /* Percentage of viewport -->
height: auto;           /* Automatic height -->
max-width: 500px;       <!-- Responsive: max size -->
```

**Responsive sizing:**
```css
width: 100%;           /* Fill parent container */
max-width: 1200px;     /* But don't exceed 1200px */
height: auto;          /* Maintain aspect ratio */
```

---

## {data-menu-title="External Stylesheet"}

[Linking External CSS (Best Practice)]{.slide-title}

<hr>

Create a separate `style.css` file:

```css
/* style.css */
body {
    background-color: #f5f5f5;
    font-family: Arial, sans-serif;
}

h1 {
    color: #333;
    text-align: center;
}

p {
    line-height: 1.6;
    margin-bottom: 15px;
}
```

In your HTML:

```html
<head>
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="style.css">
</head>
```

::: {.fragment .body-text-m .center-text .topbr}
[One CSS file styles all HTML pages!]{.magenta-text}
:::

---

## {data-menu-title="CSS Best Practices"}

[CSS Best Practices]{.slide-title}

<hr>

::: {.incremental .body-text-m}
1. **Use external stylesheets** - Separate content and design
2. **Use meaningful class names** - `.red-button` not `.x123`
3. **Keep CSS organized** - Group related styles
4. **Avoid inline styles** - Use classes instead
5. **Use CSS variables** - For consistent colors/sizes
6. **Mobile-first approach** - Design for mobile, enhance for desktop
7. **Validate your CSS** - Check for errors
:::

---

## {data-menu-title="CSS Variables"}

[CSS Custom Properties (Variables)]{.slide-title}

<hr>

Define and reuse values:

```{.css code-line-numbers="|1-5|6|7|8"}
:root {
    --primary-color: #0066cc;
    --secondary-color: #ff9900;
    --font-size: 16px;
}

h1 { color: var(--primary-color); }
p { color: var(--secondary-color); }
button { font-size: var(--font-size); }
```

::: {.fragment .body-text-m .center-text .topbr}
[Change color in one place, updates everywhere!]{.teal-text}
:::

---

## {data-menu-title="Resources"}

[Resources & References]{.slide-title}

<hr>

::: {.body-text-m}
- [MDN: CSS](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/CSS)
- [CSS-Tricks](https://css-tricks.com/)
- [CSS Color Names](https://www.w3schools.com/colors/colors_names.asp)
- [Font Resources: Google Fonts](https://fonts.google.com/)
- [Course content: Week 2](/content/week-02.qmd)
:::

---

## {#end-slide data-menu-title="End Slide" background="#053660"}

<div class="page-center">
<div class="custom-subtitle">
[Questions?]{.white-text}
</div>
<div class="custom-subtitle3">
Next: Week 3 - CSS Styling & JavaScript Introduction
</div>
</div>
